name: Chocolate Chess Pie- Whnp81a
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the cocoa, cornstarch, evaporated milk, and vanilla, stirring continuously to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crusts, dividing evenly between the two.
5. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce the oven temperature to 300°F and bake an additional 25 minutes, or until set.
7. Makes 2 pies.
